title: 10th Pass Jobs 2026 – Constable
shortInfo: SSB has published the Constable Recruitment 2026 notification to fillup 50 Constable (General Duty) posts through SSB. Apply online by June 20. Check eligibility, age limit, syllabus, selection process, important dates, and apply online link here.

basic_details.job_title: SSB Constable Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 50 Posts
basic_details.short_information: SSB has published the Constable Recruitment 2026 notification to fillup 50 Constable (General Duty) posts through SSB. Apply online by June 20. Check eligibility, age limit, syllabus, selection process, important dates, and apply online link here.

application_fee.details: Maximum Age: 35 years. Age Relaxation: 05 years for SC/ST candidates.

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the SSB Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: Matriculation or equivalent from a recognized board or institute
qualification.details: Matriculation or equivalent from a recognized board or institute.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: ssb.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the SSB Constable (General Duty) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission and receiving applications for the SSB Constable (General Duty) recruitment is 20-06-2026.

faq.question: What is the total number of vacancies for Constable (General Duty) posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 50 vacancies for the Constable (General Duty) post in the Sashastra Seema Bal.

faq.question: What is the minimum qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is Matriculation or equivalent from a recognized board or institute.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Constable (General Duty) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Constable (General Duty) post is 35 years, with age relaxation for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply offline by sending the application form to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: What are the stages in the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Physical Standard Test (PST), Physical Efficiency Test (PET), Written Examination, Documentation and Detailed Medical Examination (DME), and Review Medical Examination (RME).

faq.question: What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is 600/RC/SSB/Remust.CT (GD)-2026/2026/3030-3152.

faq.question: What is the job type for the Constable (General Duty) post?
faq.answer: The job type for the Constable (General Duty) post is Full Time.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.

seo_tags: Sashastra Seema Bal Constable (General Duty) Recruitment 2026
